stages.name: Environment Setup
stages.description: Create repository, install dependencies, download datasets and models
actions: Create repository skeleton with directories: src/, data/, configs/, tests/
Write requirements.txt with torch, transformers, datasets, numpy, accelerate, and install via pip
Download GPQA Main dataset from official source and place into data/gpqa_main/
Download GSM8K dataset from Hugging Face datasets library and save to data/gsm8k/
Download AlpacaEval Creative Writing dataset and save to data/alpacaeval/
Download Mistral 7B model from Hugging Face Hub and cache in models/mistral-7b/
Download Mistral Large (123B) model and cache in models/mistral-large/
Clone the official paper repository for reference: git clone <URL> reference_code/

stages.name: Inference Setup
stages.description: Set up inference pipeline (no training required)
actions: Create src/sampling/min_p_sampler.py with a LogitsProcessor class for Hugging Face generation
Implement logit scaling: divide logits by temperature τ when τ != 1.0
Implement softmax conversion and compute maximum probability p_max
Implement threshold computation scaled_min_p = p_base * p_max and create boolean removal mask
Sort token indices by original logits descending and modify mask to keep at least min_tokens_to_keep tokens
Apply the final mask by setting logits of removed tokens to -inf
Use the filtered logits for multinomial sampling to select the next token
Write unit tests in tests/test_min_p.py covering temperature scaling, masking edge cases, and top-k keep logic

stages.name: Evaluation
stages.description: Run evaluation on all experiments and compute metrics
actions: Write evaluate_gpqa.py to load Mistral 7B, run min-p and baselines across τ values, and compute accuracy
Write evaluate_gsm8k.py for chain-of-thought self-consistency: generate answers, compute accuracy and diversity
Write evaluate_alpacaeval.py to generate creative writing outputs and compute win rate (e.g., using GPT-4 judge)
Implement entropy of correct predictions metric in src/metrics/entropy.py for GPQA and GSM8K
Execute GPQA evaluation suite: python evaluate_gpqa.py --config configs/gpqa.yaml
Execute GSM8K CoT evaluation: python evaluate_gsm8k.py --config configs/gsm8k.yaml --self-consistency 10
Execute AlpacaEval evaluation: python evaluate_alpacaeval.py --config configs/alpacaeval.yaml
Collect all metrics and generate result tables in results/ directory

stages.name: Final Verification
stages.description: Compare reproduced results against paper claims
actions: Load GPQA results and create table comparing min-p accuracy vs top-p, top-k, temperature-only; assert superiority
Load GSM8K self-consistency results; plot accuracy vs diversity Pareto frontier and confirm min-p dominates top-p
Verify min-p win rates on AlpacaEval exceed top-p and other baselines; compute length-controlled win rate
Run min-p on Mistral Large at τ=3.0 and confirm accuracy >22% on GPQA Main
Measure generation throughput of min-p vs entropy-based (η/ε) sampling and verify lower runtime overhead
Produce verification report summarizing reproduced numbers, comparing to paper claims, and flagging discrepancies
Compile final verification document with plots and tables
